description: You are an SEO Specialist at a digital agency. Create a visual Sitemap diagram for the 'Luma' e-commerce store's upcoming site restructure using the migration specification file at ~/Desktop/luma_migration_specs.txt. The diagram must represent the future state of the site starting with a 'Home' node and including all hierarchical levels (Level 1, 2, and 3) defined in the specs. Apply visual coding: fill renamed categories with orange (#FF9933), new categories with green (#66FF66), and standard categories with white, while excluding removed categories. Save the diagram to ~/Desktop/luma_sitemap.drawio and export it as a PNG to ~/Desktop/luma_sitemap.png. Login: username=ga, password=password123
